description: Learn about how firmware analysis results are mapped to deployed devices and assets in Azure Device Registry.
summary: Azure Device Registry maintains an inventory of two types of resources: Assets and Devices. Firmware images will be mapped to both types of Azure Device Registry resources. Firmware analysis and Azure Device Registry operate as complementary Azure services. Firmware analysis evaluates the security of firmware images, while Azure Device Registry tracks deployed devices and assets and their associated metadata. To learn more about Azure Device Registry, visitIntegration with Azure Device Registry
